rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA JOAN FARMER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel San Jose Water Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 1, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs CYNTHIA FARMER, LINDA MARIN, SANDRA KENNEY's motion to compel San Jose Water Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable and to produce documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions is continued to July 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. BARANCO et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Third Motion To Compel Defendant General Cable Corporations Person(S) Most Knowledgeable|Custodian Of Records Depositions And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 1, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel depositions and documents from defendant General Cable Corporation was continued on the court¿s own motion to June 30 and continued again to July 1 at the parties¿ request. Unless the parties have fully resolved all issues raised by the motion before then, by 5pm today they must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the remaining issues in dispute and then appear at the hearing tomorrow at 9am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JACK WARREN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS 'B*P' AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Boeing Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Document
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, July 1, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel The Boeing Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable and to produce documents is denied due to plaintiffs¿ failure to respond to December 2009 and January 2010 meet and confer letters sent to plaintiffs¿ counsel by Boeing¿s counsel. = (220/HEK)
